code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut current = ""
mut last = ""
mut has_last = false
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 10
    let trimmed = string.trim(current)
    if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
      last = current
      has_last = true
    end
    current = ""
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

let final_trimmed = string.trim(current)
if not string.is_empty(final_trimmed)
  last = current
  has_last = true
end

if has_last
  println(last)
else
  println("(none)")
end
